rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KATHERINE ESTHER HINES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production Of Documents And Things, Set One; Monetary Sanctions; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities.
rulings.Rulings: Granted, no opposition filed. Respondent Karen Taylor must serve complete responses without objections to the special interrogatories and requests for production within 10 days. Respondent must also pay sanctions to Petitioner in the amount of $2025, also within 10 days. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, November 29, 2016.
